# THE SIGNAL
> A public, self-grading oracle that makes dated, falsifiable tech predictions every day and keeps score in the open. Rules-based, no LLM.

## Pages
- Homepage: /
- Today's call (plain text): /cli
- RSS feed: /feed.xml
- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml
- Latest call: /call/10.html

## How it works
Reads Hacker News, arXiv, GitHub, Lobsters, dev.to and Ars Technica. Each call carries a concrete win condition and is settled HIT or MISS against later signals. Current record: 8-2. Tech Acceleration Index today: 56 (ACTIVE).
